block.ae2enhanced.micro_singularity.tool:
§8§o"A creation from the event horizon"§r
§7Right-click the event horizon to throw items into the black hole for crafting.
§7Generation: §eThrow 64 AE2 Singularities and 4 Nether Stars §7onto the ground,
§7then §ehold 1 Nether Star and right-click an ME Controller §7to spawn a Micro Singularity.

gui.ae2enhanced.tooltip.upgrades.paralle: • Parallel Extension Module: Increases batch parallel cap
gui.ae2enhanced.tooltip.upgrades.speed: • Overclock Processing Module: Reduces batch cooldown
gui.ae2enhanced.tooltip.upgrades.efficie: • Energy Optimization Module: Reduces AE network power draw
gui.ae2enhanced.tooltip.upgrades.capacit: • Dimensional Fold Module: Expands pattern storage capacity
gui.ae2enhanced.tooltip.upgrades.upload: • Auto-Upload Module: Auto-imports encoded patterns into controller

item.ae2enhanced.upgrade_card.parallel.t:
§7Folds immense crafting timelines into a single tick, raising the parallel processing limit for batch crafting.
§7Thresholds: §e64 §8| §e2,048 §8| §e65,536 §8| §e2,097,152 §8| §e67,108,864 §8| §e∞
§7Stack Limit: §b%d §7cards
 §b§l"This very moment is all of eternity"
item.ae2enhanced.upgrade_card.speed.tool:
§7Leverages relativistic effects of the contained singularity to reduce batch crafting cooldown. Each tier halves cooldown.
§7Max Cooldown: §e1 tick
§7Stack Limit: §b%d §7cards
 §b§l"One day spans all seasons"
item.ae2enhanced.upgrade_card.efficiency: §7Reduces AE network power consumption of the Assembly Hub.\n§7Stack Limit: §b%d §7cards
item.ae2enhanced.upgrade_card.capacity.t: §7Expands pattern storage dimensional capacity. Each tier adds §e480 §7slots (5 pages).\n§7Stack Limit: §b%d §7cards
item.ae2enhanced.upgrade_card.upload.too:
§7Automatically uploads §eencoded crafting patterns §7from the ME Pattern Terminal to the nearest Assembly Hub.
§7§8(Processing patterns will not be auto-uploaded)
§7Requires the controller to be assembled and this upgrade installed.
§7Stack Limit: §b%d §7cards
 §b§l"Knowledge is power"
item.ae2enhanced.conformal_invariant_cha:
§e§lConformal Invariant Charge §7
A topological quantum charge preserved under conformal transformations,
invariant across all reference frames.
§8A creation from the black hole, an incomprehensible form of matter.
§b§l"Invariance is the only true constant"
item.ae2enhanced.differential_form_stabi:
§e§lDifferential Form Stabilizer §7
Stabilizes the differential geometric structure of spacetime,
preventing catastrophic manifold degeneration.
§8Sufficient to stabilize the metric variations caused by the black hole.
§b§l"Form without boundary, stable without limit"
item.ae2enhanced.stable_spacetime_manifo:
§e§lStable Spacetime Manifold §7
A self-stabilizing region of spacetime extracted from the event horizon,
maintaining topological integrity under extreme curvature.
§8A piece of stable spacetime manifold.
§b§l"Where time stands still"
death.spacetime.blackHole: %1$s was forever lost in the event horizon
